claimText: The Green Climate Fund (GCF) was established at COP 16 in Cancun and mandates a 50:50 investment split between mitigation and adaptation.
evidenceExcerpt: Green Climate Fund (GCF) was established at COP 16 in Cancun (2010) and mandates a 50:50 investment split between mitigation and adaptation.
examUse: Statement-based question on the origin and funding allocation rules of the Green Climate Fund.

claimText: The ARISE investment program is implemented through the Climate Investment Funds (CIF), which consists of the Clean Technology Fund and the Strategic Climate Fund.
evidenceExcerpt: ARISE is implemented through Climate Investment Funds (CIF), which comprises the Clean Technology Fund and Strategic Climate Fund.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching climate programs to their implementing financial mechanisms.
distractorHooks: Implemented directly by the Green Climate Fund
Implemented by the Global Environment Facility (GEF)

claimText: The Blue NDC Challenge, launched by Brazil and France, aims to integrate oceans into NDCs because oceans act as carbon sinks that absorb up to four times more CO2 than terrestrial forests.
evidenceExcerpt: Blue NDC Challenge was launched by Brazil and France to place oceans at the heart of NDCs, recognizing oceans as carbon sinks that absorb up to 4 times more CO2 than terrestrial forests.
examUse: Statement-based question on ocean-based climate initiatives and the comparative carbon sink capacity of oceans versus forests.
distractorHooks: Terrestrial forests absorb more CO2 than oceans
Focuses on freshwater ecosystems instead of oceans

claimText: The Leadership Group for Industry Transition (LeadIT) was launched jointly by India and Sweden to achieve net-zero carbon emissions from high-emitting industries by 2050.
evidenceExcerpt: Leadership Group for Industry Transition (LeadIT) was launched jointly by India and Sweden in 2019 to achieve net-zero carbon emissions from high-emitting industries by 2050.
examUse: Statement-based or correct-pair question on international climate partnerships involving India and their specific targets.
distractorHooks: Focuses on the agricultural sector rather than high-emitting industries
